title: X-tra Sweet Peruvian Sweet Potato Picarones
description: A traditional Peruvian dessert featuring sweet potato doughnuts, deep-fried to perfection and drizzled with a Marsala wine glaze.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Peel and mash the sweet potatoes in a large mixing bowl.
Whisk together the flour, sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a separate bowl.
Add the dry ingredients to the sweet potato mixture and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5-7 minutes, until it becomes elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces, and shape each piece into a ball.
Use a fork to create a pattern on each ball of dough, then use your thumbs to create a hole in the center.
Stretch and thin each piece of dough into a doughnut shape, about 1/4 inch thick.
Fry the doughnuts in batches for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Drain the doughnuts on paper towels and let cool for a few minutes.
Whisk together the Marsala wine and 1 tablespoon of sugar in a small bowl, until well combined.
Dip the top of each doughnut in the Marsala glaze, and serve warm.
